title: myristica coriacea
intro: Myristica coriacea, also known as the Myristica tree or Pahit, is a species of plant in the family Myristicaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is used to promote overall health and well-being, with reported health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
